description: In OrientDB Studio (http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html), connect to the 'demodb' database (username: root, password: GymAnything123!). The DemoDB is a social travel agency graph database where users (Profiles) can befriend each other via 'HasFriend' graph edges. Create a new friendship by adding a 'HasFriend' edge from the Profile with the email 'domi@nek.gov' to the Profile with the email 'seari@ubu.edu'.
